title: Proportion
claim: A proportion states that two ratios are equal within a defined context.
proof: If ratio a:b equals ratio c:d, then the two relationships preserve the same relative quantity structure.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by scaling two pairs of quantities and observing preserved relative structure.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: If ratio a:b equals ratio c:d, then the two relationships preserve the same relative quantity structure.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: If ratio a:b equals ratio c:d, then the two relationships preserve the same relative quantity structure.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Can be rediscovered by scaling two pairs of quantities and observing preserved relative structure.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
